_metadata.comment: Equifax Canada deploys Ketch CMP without a Reject All button on the banner or in the preferences modal. The generic ketch rule clicks the secondary button to open the preferences modal, then fails to find a reject button and leaves the user stuck inside the unclosable modal. This rule overrides the generic ketch flow on equifax.ca by toggling off non-essential consent switches and clicking Save Settings.

optOut.comment: Toggle off every currently-enabled, non-required switch. Strictly Necessary is disabled and is skipped. In regions where Ketch defaults all switches to off (e.g. EEA/UK under GDPR), there is nothing to toggle and we skip straight to Save Settings.
